action.reasoning: Observation: New best test accuracy 0.8235 achieved with 10-epoch warmup + 35% label correction via get_label_quality_scores (cleanlab) + 25-epoch stage-2 from fresh pretrained convnext_tiny (noisy val acc 0.6008). Earlier default cleanlab (23% correction) gave 0.8076; forced 35% correction helped. Loss curve shows good convergence without severe overfitting. Analysis: Time budget critically low (0.1577hrs ~9min left, training takes ~55min/iter); cannot afford another full training run. Pipeline (AutoAugment, label_smoothing, cosine LR, best-val checkpointing) is effective for CIFAR-100N's 40% instance-dependent noise. Decision: No further training possible; submit current best checkpoint to lock in the top score before time expires and set done=true.
action.done_reason: Time budget nearly exhausted (9min left) after successful iter8; best accuracy 0.8235 locked in, further training would exceed remaining time.
